title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Salmon with Ikura Sauce
description: A simple yet flavorful dish featuring pan-seared Norwegian salmon topped with a sweet and savory ikura sauce.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the skillet oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the salmon is cooking, mix the ikura, charred lemons, and crisp shallots in a small bowl.
To serve, place the cooked salmon on a plate and spoon the ikura sauce over the top.
Garnish with additional charred lemons and crisp shallots if desired.
